calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Mar-30-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Marlena Moore and Caitlin Carey for David Katz (Petitioner).

Ms. Carey explained that the warrants are for spousal support owed by the Decedent's ex-husband, that she has no information as to why they were not cashed, that they are looking for practical language to help in enforcing the order and that they revised the order to read "the account title needs to be changed in the name of the Trust or be distributed to the Trust". The Court granted the Petition for Order Confirming Trust Assets (subject to review of the order).

Judge: John K. Stewart. Court Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.
